_comment: DESIGN EXEMPLAR for ADR-009 (proposed). Not a live registry record: lives outside metadata/, is not validated by the Tier A gate, and carries placeholder scale values flagged provisional. Purpose: a concrete amr.assessment.v2 shape for WIDA-ACCESS Indiana to dogfood the v2 design against before JSON Schema authoring.

provenance.changed_from_prior: v2 exemplar derived from wida-access-in-2024.json (v1) + ADR-009 additions: enrollment block, scale_bounds, measurement.elp, source_documents.

source_documents.title: WIDA ACCESS for ELLs Interpretive Guide for Score Reports (2023-2024)

organization.name: WIDA at the Wisconsin Center for Education Research, University of Wisconsin-Madison

enrollment.note: Grade-span (cluster) instruments — see measurement.elp.grade_clusters. Scores, proficiency-level lookups, and accountability exit thresholds are interpreted by ENROLLED grade, not by cluster form.

cutscores_provenance: PLACEHOLDER — scale_bounds entry illustrates v2 shape only (WIDA nominal 100-600 scale envelope, per-enrolled-grade keying); replace with official WIDA proficiency-level scale-score lookups per enrolled grade before any client-facing use. Grade-by-level cut lookups, when authored, go in cutscores[ELP_COMPOSITE][<enrolled grade>].

elp.band_scheme: WIDA proficiency levels 1.0-6.0 reported to tenths; scale scores 100-600

_accountability_cross_reference: ELP exit criteria, growth targets, and timelines are POLICY facts and are NOT in this record — see metadata/IN/in-accountability/in-accountability-2024.json (targets[] semantics: exit; per-grade exit thresholds, e.g. grade 5 = 364.4).
